description: Curated government scheme fact-cards. Structured facts (eligibility, documents, how to apply, official link), not parsed statute. Each carries scheme provenance: governing authority and official scheme URL in place of a section number.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
schemes.governing_authority: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
schemes.facts: Eligibility: EWS/LIG/MIG households without a pucca house. Documents: Aadhaar, income proof, bank details. How to apply: online at pmaymis.gov.in or at a Common Service Centre.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.facts: Eligibility: families identified in the SECC database. Benefit: health cover up to Rs 5 lakh per family per year. How to apply: verify eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or a listed hospital.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.governing_authority: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.facts: Eligibility: all landholding farmer families, subject to exclusion criteria. Benefit: income support of 6000 rupees per year in three equal instalments. Documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account. How to apply: online at pmkisan.gov.in or at a Common Service Centre or the local revenue officer.

schemes.name: National Social Assistance Programme
schemes.facts: Eligibility: destitute elderly persons, widows, and persons with severe disability from below-poverty-line households. Benefit: monthly pension under the old age, widow, and disability pension schemes. Documents: Aadhaar, age or disability proof, BPL card, bank account. How to apply: at the Gram Panchayat or municipality or online at nsap.nic.in.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.facts: Eligibility: a girl child below ten years of age; the account is opened by a parent or guardian. Benefit: a small savings account with a high fixed interest rate and tax benefits, maturing when the girl turns 21. Documents: birth certificate of the girl child, identity and address proof of the guardian. How to apply: at any post office or authorised bank branch.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.facts: Eligibility: bank or post office account holders aged 18 to 50 years who give consent for auto-debit. Benefit: a one-year renewable life insurance cover of 2 lakh rupees for death due to any reason, for a low annual premium. Documents: Aadhaar linked to the bank account. How to apply: through the account-holding bank or post office, or online at jansuraksha.gov.in.
